name: DPO
description: Dual Primary Oscillator. Two analog complex VCOs with shared FM/Mod buses, Shape/Angle/Fold wavefolder on VCO B, Hard Sync, Lock, LFO mode and vactrol Strike. Buchla 259 lineage.

controls.name: Expo Attenuator
controls.description: Unipolar attenuator for Expo FM input.

controls.name: Linear FM Att
controls.description: Per-VCO attenuator for Linear FM input. VCO A is uni, VCO B is attenuverter.
controls.detail: VCO A: unipolar · VCO B: bipolar

controls.name: VCO A Mode Button
controls.detail: No LED: Standard · Blue: Lock to B · Pink: Hard Sync to B · Amber: LFO

controls.name: Follow
controls.description: Determines how much VCO A tracks VCO B's 1V/Oct. Becomes attenuator when Follow CV is patched.
controls.detail: CW: full lag-free follow · CCW: independent · combo pot

controls.name: FM Bus Index
controls.description: Master depth of internal FM bus (sine-FM in both directions). Index LED shows value.

controls.name: FM Bus Index CV Att
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for FM Bus Index CV.

controls.name: Shape
controls.description: Morphs waveform feeding the Fold circuit. Crossfades via vactrol — slow/smooth.
controls.detail: CCW: Sine · 12:00: Spike · CW: Glitched Triangle · phase-reversal window ~12:00

controls.name: Shape CV Att
controls.description: Unipolar attenuator for Shape CV. Normalled to Mod Bus.

controls.name: Angle
controls.description: Tilts added harmonics to one end of the wave-cycle. Asymmetric folding.

controls.name: Angle CV Att
controls.description: Unipolar attenuator for Angle CV. Normalled to Mod Bus.

controls.name: Fold
controls.description: Wavefolder depth. First 30% acts as VCA; past 30% introduces fold thresholds.

controls.name: Fold CV Att
controls.description: Unipolar attenuator for Fold CV. Normalled to Mod Bus.

controls.name: Mod Bus Index
controls.description: Master depth of Mod Bus (Sine from VCO A to Shape/Angle/Fold). Index LED shows value.

controls.name: Mod Bus Index CV Att
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Mod Bus Index CV.

inputs.name: VCO A Expo
inputs.description: Exponential FM CV. Normalled to FM Bus.

inputs.name: VCO A Linear FM
inputs.description: AC-coupled Linear FM. Normalled to FM Bus.

inputs.name: VCO B Expo
inputs.description: Exponential FM CV. Normalled to FM Bus.

inputs.name: VCO B Linear FM
inputs.description: AC-coupled Linear FM. Normalled to FM Bus.

inputs.name: VCO B External Lock
inputs.description: Phase-reversed weak sync to external VCO. Use square/pulse/saw.

inputs.name: Follow CV
inputs.description: CV over Follow amount. Follow knob becomes attenuator when patched.

inputs.name: Shape CV
inputs.description: Unipolar CV for Shape. Normalled into Mod Bus.

inputs.name: Angle CV
inputs.description: Bipolar CV for Angle. Normalled into Mod Bus.

inputs.name: Fold CV
inputs.description: Unipolar CV for Fold. Normalled into Mod Bus.

inputs.name: Mod Bus External Source
inputs.description: Interrupts VCO A Sine as Mod Bus source. Replaces internal routing.

inputs.name: Strike
inputs.description: Briefly opens Fold circuit to 100%. Gate/clock input.

outputs.name: VCO A Triangle
outputs.description: Tapped from triangle core — good for Shape modulation and Hard Sync source.

outputs.name: VCO A Sawtooth
outputs.description: Core saw. More aggressive than Triangle/Sine for FM and filter input.

outputs.name: VCO A Sine
outputs.description: Sine shaped from triangle core. Default Mod Bus source.

outputs.name: VCO B Square
outputs.description: Asymmetrical square. Use for External Lock chain or subtractive patches.

outputs.name: VCO B FINAL
outputs.description: Full Timbre-section output — post Shape, Angle, Fold. Main musical output.

behaviors.name: FM Bus (internal sine cross-FM)
behaviors.description: Hardwired Sine-wave bus: VCO A Sine → VCO B Linear/Expo FM AND VCO B Sine → VCO A Linear/Expo FM simultaneously. FM Bus Index is master depth. Per-destination attenuators let you set different FM depths on each VCO. Past ~80% the bus overdrives into bi-directional dynamic FM chaos.

behaviors.name: Mod Bus (internal sine → Timbre)
behaviors.description: Hardwired VCO A Sine → Shape, Angle, Fold CVs. Per-destination unipolar attenuators. Patching a cable to Mod Bus External Source replaces VCO A Sine with that signal as Mod Bus source — audio-rate modulation of Timbre from any external source.

behaviors.name: VCO A Lock (Blue LED)
behaviors.description: Extremely weak phase-sync: VCO A approaches an integer ratio of VCO B and small tuning errors correct. Useful for cleaning up FM patches where VCO A is the modulator. Does not impart audible harmonics.

behaviors.name: VCO A Hard Sync (Pink LED)
behaviors.description: VCO B restarts VCO A's cycle at each B cycle. Introduces strong harmonics. Sweeping VCO A FREQ above VCO B generates classic sync sweeps. Master should be ≥100Hz for best results.

behaviors.name: VCO A LFO mode (Amber LED)
behaviors.description: VCO A becomes an LFO. Routes onto FM and Mod Buses for slow cross-modulation of VCO B. Shape and Angle parameters respond beautifully to VCO A LFO-rate modulation via Mod Bus. Beat-Frequency LED also becomes a tempo indicator.

behaviors.name: Follow tracking
behaviors.description: Determines how well VCO A tracks VCO B 1V/Oct. Full CW: A perfectly follows B (maintains FM/Sync ratios with sequencer). CCW: A is fully independent. Mid settings produce pitch-lag glissandi — 'skronk' effect when a new sequencer note arrives.

behaviors.name: Shape vactrol crossfade phase reversal
behaviors.description: Shape is vactrol-based — slow smooth crossfade. Around the 12:00 region the Shape circuit performs amplitude modulation and phase reversal on its own, causing subtle folding-like behavior before the Fold stage. Use LFO on Shape for subtle timbral animation.

behaviors.name: Strike briefly opens Fold
behaviors.description: Strike input momentarily snaps Fold to 100% for the duration of the gate. Creates accents, percussive clicks, audio-rate fold modulation. Often multed with a sequencer gate for brightness-per-note.

behaviors.name: External Lock on VCO B
behaviors.description: Weak phase-reversed sync of VCO B to an external VCO. VCO B approaches integer of external signal. Phase-reversal means summing VCO B + Ext source produces amplitude cancellations dependent on phase — modulating VCO B via Expo CV pushes it out of lock and back.

behaviors.name: Fold first 30% acts as VCA
behaviors.description: Below 30%, the Fold circuit behaves like a VCA on the post-Shape/Angle signal — useful for percussive VCA duties without additional modules. Past 30%, folding begins and the circuit loses its VCA character.

patchIdeas.name: Animated lead (classic DPO voice)
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer → VCO B 1V/Oct · Shape, Angle CVs attenuators 12:00 · Fold ~9:00, Fold CV att 12:00 · Mod Bus Index 12:00 · gate → Strike · VCO A Mode: Amber (LFO), FREQ ~9:00, Follow full CW · monitor FINAL · VCO A as LFO animates VCO B Timbre via Mod Bus while Follow keeps harmonic ratio locked as sequence plays.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO A: Amber (LFO), FREQ ~9:00
* VCO B: Shape/Angle att 12:00, Fold ~9:00
* Follow: full CW
* Mod Bus Index: 12:00

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> DPO (VCO B 1V/Oct)
- Gate Source (Gate) g> DPO (Strike)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Bass drum
patchIdeas.patch: VCO A Sine → Optomix CH 1 · stepped random (Wogglebug) → VCO A Linear FM In (att 12:00) · Wogglebug Clock → Optomix STRIKE · FREQ VCO A ~9:00 · Optomix DAMP/CONTROL full CCW · kick with varying FM character per hit · mult same gate to FM Bus Index for dynamic index expansion.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO A: FREQ ~9:00
* VCO A Lin FM Att: 12:00

- Wogglebug (Stepped) >> DPO (VCO A Lin FM)
- Wogglebug (Clock) c> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- DPO (VCO A Sine) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) -> Output (In) // kick

patchIdeas.name: Skronky FM
patchIdeas.patch: VCO A Mode: Pink (Hard Sync to B) · Follow ~3:00 · VCO B Lin FM att 12:00 · FM Bus Index 12:00 · tune VCOs to unison/fifth/octave · sequencer → VCO B 1V/Oct · Follow lag creates discordant FM squelch each note change as VCO A slides to catch up · monitor VCO B Sine.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO A: Pink (Sync to B)
* Follow: ~3:00
* VCO B Lin FM Att: 12:00
* FM Bus Index: 12:00

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> DPO (VCO B 1V/Oct)
- DPO (VCO B Sine) -> Output (In) // skronky sync slides

patchIdeas.name: Strike Force (PP-controlled fold)
patchIdeas.patch: Shape and Fold knobs full CCW · Shape/Fold CV atts 12:00 · Pressure Points Common Gate → Strike · PP tuned voltage → VCO B 1V/Oct · PP Common Pressure → Mod Bus External Source · sound grows louder AND more damped with pressure — expressive one-handed DPO voicing.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO B: Shape/Fold full CCW, atts 12:00

- Pressure Points (Tuned B) p> DPO (VCO B 1V/Oct)
- Pressure Points (Common Gate) g> DPO (Strike)
- Pressure Points (Pressure) >> DPO (Mod Bus Ext Source)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wobble bass
patchIdeas.patch: Fold, Angle, Shape 12:00 atts 12:00 · VCO A Mode: Amber (LFO), FREQ ~9:00 · Mod Bus Index full CW · FM Bus Index full CCW · Follow full CW · sequencer → VCO B 1V/Oct · wobble speed doubles per octave because VCO A LFO tracks B pitch via Follow · expressive dubstep-style bass.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO A: Amber (LFO), FREQ ~9:00
* VCO B: Fold/Angle/Shape 12:00
* Follow: full CW
* Mod Bus Index: full CW
* FM Bus Index: full CCW

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> DPO (VCO B 1V/Oct)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Cross-FM drone
patchIdeas.patch: Both VCOs tuned to unison or fifth · FM Bus Index ~2:00 (near overdrive) · Mode: standard (no sync) · Follow CCW · no sequencer · slow LFO → FM Bus Index CV · index slowly modulates into/out of overdrive · monitor VCO B FINAL · evolving bidirectional cross-FM drone.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO A: standard
* Both VCOs tuned to fifth
* FM Bus Index: ~2:00

LFO:

- LFO (Out) >> DPO (FM Bus Index CV)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: External Lock chord stack
patchIdeas.patch: VCO B1 Square → DPO 2 VCO B Ext Lock · DPO 2 VCO B tuned to 3rd or 5th above · External Lock gently pulls the pair into harmonic relation · sum both FINAL outputs → mixer · chord-tuned stack without detuning drift. Add more DPOs the same way for thicker stacks.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO 1:
* VCO B tuned to root

DPO 2:
* VCO B tuned to 3rd

- DPO 1 (VCO B Square) -> DPO 2 (Ext Lock)
- DPO 1 (VCO B FINAL) -> Mixer (In)
- DPO 2 (VCO B FINAL) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: West-coast bongo
patchIdeas.patch: Shape full CCW · Angle 12:00 · Fold 9:00 · Fold CV att 12:00 · gate → Strike AND → Optomix CH 1 Strike · VCO B FINAL → Optomix CH 1 Signal In · Optomix DAMP ~9:00 · random CV → VCO B 1V/Oct · each gate opens Fold + plucks LPG → classic bongo.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* Shape: full CCW
* Angle: 12:00
* Fold: 9:00

- Random CV (Out) p> DPO (VCO B 1V/Oct)
- Gate (Trig) g> DPO (Strike)
- Gate (Trig) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) -> Output (In) // bongo

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate Mod Bus injection
patchIdeas.patch: External audio source → Mod Bus External Source · Shape CV att, Angle CV att, Fold CV att all 12:00 · Mod Bus Index 2:00 · Timbre section modulated by arbitrary external signal at audio rate · works well with filtered noise, samples, another VCO's saw — very different character from default VCO A Sine.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* Mod Bus Index: 2:00
* Shape/Angle/Fold CV atts: 12:00
* VCO B: FREQ bass range

- External Audio (Out) -> DPO (Mod Bus Ext Source)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Quadrature LFOs from DPO
patchIdeas.patch: VCO A Mode: Amber (LFO) · VCO A Sine and VCO A Triangle outs = two phase-related LFOs · patch Sine to filter cutoff and Triangle to VCA CV · add Follow + sequencer → VCO B 1V/Oct to make VCO B audible voice while VCO A doubles as mod source · DPO as 1-VCO voice + dual modulator.
patchIdeas.diagram:
DPO:
* VCO A: Amber (LFO)
* Follow: full CW

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> DPO (VCO B 1V/Oct)
- DPO (VCO A Sine) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- DPO (VCO A Triangle) >> VCA (CV)
- DPO (VCO B FINAL) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)
